problem id: a794d193
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00011110 -> 00111100
  11101010 -> 11010011
  10111001 -> 01110111
  10011011 -> 00110010
  01011000 -> 10110010
  10011010 -> 00110000
  11111010 -> 11110011
  01101100 -> 11011011

query: 10101100
predicted answer: 01011101
